title: NestJS Library Generator
description: Create a NestJS library with ESM, Vitest, and Biome

directory.description: A directory where the library is placed.
directory.x-prompt: Which directory do you want to create the library in?

importPath.description: The library name used to import it, like @myorg/my-awesome-lib. Must be a valid npm name.

controller.description: Include a controller with the library.

service.description: Include a service with the library.

global.description: Add the Global decorator to the generated module.

bundler.description: Build bundler to use for buildable/publishable libraries
bundler.x-prompt: Which bundler would you like to use? (Vite is recommended for ESM libraries)

validation.description: Validation library for request validation (Standard Schema support)
validation.x-prompt: Which validation library would you like to use?

unitTestRunner.description: Test runner to use for unit tests.
unitTestRunner.x-prompt: Which unit test runner would you like to use?

tags.description: Add tags to the library (used for linting).

skipTsConfig.description: Do not update tsconfig.base.json for development experience.

skipPackageJson.description: Do not add dependencies to package.json.

strict.description: Whether to enable tsconfig strict mode or not.
